theme_and_archetype.archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with High-Energy African Delivery Branding
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: High-contrast light theme ensures map legibility under bright sunlight (Lagos streets). Brutalist, schematic clarity mixed with a hyper-vibrant primary color for brand recognition and speed.

primary.name: Okada Orange
primary.usage: Primary buttons, route lines on map, active icons, rider pins, online toggles.

secondary.name: Asphalt Black
secondary.usage: Headers, heavy text, role selection cards, bottom sheet drag handles.

rules.no_default_sans: Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
rules.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text. Use Asphalt Black for primary text.

layout_spacing_strategy.base_grid: Mobile-first, flexible layout using padding scales.
layout_spacing_strategy.card_padding: p-6 (Generous internal padding to prevent cramped text).
layout_spacing_strategy.map_layout: Full screen (absolute fill) with overlaid floating components (Search bars top, Bottom Sheets bottom).

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4F00] text-white rounded-xl h-14 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white rounded-xl h-14 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-xl h-14 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg

bottom_sheet.container: bg-white rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] pt-2 pb-8 px-6
bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-slate-200 rounded-full mx-auto mb-6

cards.container: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-5

inputs.container: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl h-14 px-4 flex items-center

map.style: Use a desaturated or 'silver' Google Maps JSON style to ensure the Okada Orange routes and markers stand out.
map.rider_marker: Custom View with Okada Orange background, white motorcycle icon, rounded-full, with subtle pulse animation.

role_selection.layout: Split screen or 2 massive cards taking 40% height each. High contrast.
role_selection.customer_card: Light theme card. Headline 'I need a delivery'. Image of package.
role_selection.rider_card: Dark theme card (Asphalt Black). Headline 'I am a Rider'. Image of rider. Okada Orange accents.

customer_home.floating_header: Location picker floating at the top (absolute, z-10, top-12).
customer_home.bottom_sheet: Persistent bottom sheet for 'Where to?'. Includes recent locations, package size selector, and 'Request Rider' button.

rider_home.status_bar: Massive toggle button at top: 'GO ONLINE' (Greyed out) -> 'YOU ARE ONLINE' (Okada Orange).
rider_home.earnings_summary: Floating card showing today's earnings overlaying the map.
rider_home.incoming_request_modal: Pops up from bottom. Massive 60s countdown timer (circular progress). Shows Pickup -> Dropoff, Est. Fare, Distance. Swipe to Accept button.

active_delivery.map: Shows route from Rider to Pickup (or Pickup to Dropoff).
active_delivery.bottom_sheet: Shows assigned user/rider details, phone call button (circular, green), and 'Slide to Arrive' / 'Slide to Complete' action.

profile_and_history.history_card: Shows date, route (A to B), status (Completed/Cancelled), and amount.

role_rider_bg.description: African motorcycle rider in city. Use for Rider Role Selection card or onboarding.

role_customer_bg.description: Exchanging package. Use for Customer Role Selection card or onboarding.

traffic_context.description: Lagos city traffic view. Use for empty states or splash screens.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React Native (Expo), standard .js files (no .tsx). Use NativeWind or React Native StyleSheet depending on project setup (Tailwind classes provided in guidelines).
instructions_to_main_agent.maps: Implement using react-native-maps. Render custom markers using <Marker> with nested <View> elements to match the WakaWaka brand.
instructions_to_main_agent.bottom_sheets: Use @gorhom/bottom-sheet or create a robust animated View for the heavy bottom-sheet usage.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react-native or @expo/vector-icons. Prefer bold, geometric icons (e.g., Package, MapPin, Navigation).
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use react-native-reanimated for the 60s timeout circular progress bar and the 'Slide to Accept/Complete' gesture.
instructions_to_main_agent.modals: Avoid standard Alert. Use custom Modal or Bottom Sheets for all prompts to maintain the super-app aesthetic.
